_comment: Curated map: eval-benchmark task families -> the training-source slugs that reconstruct them. Slugs are matched against the `id` field of sft/_sft_tags.jsonl (framing suffix `#rN` stripped). MLS-Bench same-task overlap is handled separately/deterministically in audit_leakage.py by intersecting source slugs with tasks/*. Benchmarks: FCS=FrontierCS, ALE=ALE-Bench, THETA=ThetaEvolve, TTT=TTT-Discover, MLS=MLS-Bench.

families.eval_task: ThetaEvolve circle_packing_modular (n=26 sum-of-radii); TTT-Discover circle packing
families.note: Exact eval task. context.md cites AlphaEvolve/Shinka/ThetaEvolve/AutoEvolver record values; endpoint rung reaches the published record.

families.eval_task: TTT-Discover Erdos minimum-overlap constant C5 (also an AlphaEvolve/ThetaEvolve math target)
families.note: context.md cites TTT-Discover 0.38087532 and AutoEvolver record; endpoint rung pushes to record resolution.
Same convolution-based objective as the eval evaluators; c1/c2 record + frontier-largeN reach the record.

families.eval_task: Heilbronn triangle problem (CONFIRMED runnable ThetaEvolve task: openevolve alphaevolve_math_problems/heilbronn_triangle + heilbronn_convex)
families.note: Full explore->record ladder incl. Goldberg optimal endpoint.

families.eval_task: Cap set problem (FunSearch/AlphaEvolve target; discovery-eval family)
Fast matrix multiplication / tensor-decomposition rank (AlphaEvolve target)
Low-autocorrelation binary sequences / LABS (AlphaEvolve-adjacent; distinct from AC1/2/3)
families.note: Distinct from the continuous autocorr inequalities but same discovery register -> MEDIUM.

families.eval_task: ALE-Bench AtCoder AHC039 'Purse Seine Fishing' (real AtCoder Heuristic Contest problem)
families.note: Real AHC problem, full bbox->grid-greedy->grid-SA->Shinka ladder incl. ShinkaEvolve-refined endpoint. ALE-Bench eval-set membership of AHC039 to be confirmed, but treat as CRITICAL.

families.eval_task: FrontierCS-research 'trimul' task + TTT-Discover GPU TriMul kernel (AlphaFold triangle multiplicative update)
families.note: Exact name-match to FrontierCS research task dir tasks/trimul.

families.eval_task: FrontierCS-research 'denoising' + TTT-Discover single-cell RNA-seq denoising (molecular cross-validation)
families.note: ttt-discover-denoise is literally named after the benchmark; magic-imputation/magic-diffusion/knn-smoothing are the OpenProblems denoising benchmark's own reference methods.

families.eval_task: FrontierCS-research flash_attention (causal SDPA fused exact-attention kernel)
families.note: 5 method reconstructions of the exact kernel the task optimizes (FlashAttention v1/2/3).

families.eval_task: FrontierCS-research mla (Multi-head Latent Attention decoding kernel)
families.note: Reconstructs low-rank KV-cache compression + RoPE, exactly the MLA kernel target.
simp reconstructs the exact named method; mma-svanberg is the standard optimizer used to solve it (weaker/topical -> MEDIUM).

families.eval_task: FrontierCS-research malloclab (CS:APP malloc/free allocator, throughput vs utilization)
Various FrontierCS-research tasks reconstructed at the technique level (topical, with a real gap -> MEDIUM; per-item verify)
families.note: car_aerodynamics_sensing(gappy-POD/DEIM), wireless_channel_simulation(importance sampling/Hamming), muon_tomography, quadruped_gait, robot_arm_cycle_time, cryptographic(AES/SHA256/SHA3), pid_tuning(ZN), uav_inspection_coverage, manned_lunar_landing.

families.eval_task: Sums & differences of finite sets / MSTD (AlphaEvolve Appendix B.6; runnable OpenEvolve example sums_diffs_finite_sets, NOT in this run's Theta/TTT subset)
families.note: Leakable Theta-family eval task with a checked-in runnable example; this run did not execute it -> MEDIUM.
